# Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin: Site Guide for AI Systems

## About this site

https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/ is the academic portfolio of
Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin, Senior Lecturer at Qasim Ibrahim School of
Business, Villa College, Malé, Maldives. ORCID: 0000-0001-5247-2964.

Research areas: quantitative research methods, digital marketing, marketing
analytics, small-sample statistics, management education.

## Textbooks

**Quantitative Analysis with Small Samples: A Practical Guide for Students
and Early-Career Researchers** (Published, v0.1.0)
- Authors: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin, Ahsan Ahmed Jaleel, Meena Madhavan
- Published: 16 May 2026
- DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20221929
- Web edition: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/quantitative-analysis-with-small-samples/
- PDF: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/quantitative-analysis-with-small-samples/Quantitative-Analysis-with-Small-Samples.pdf
- Licence: CC BY 4.0
- 18 chapters and 5 worked R projects.
- Preferred citation: Sharafuddin, M. A., Jaleel, A. A., & Madhavan, M.
  (2026). Quantitative Analysis with Small Samples: A Practical Guide for
  Students and Early-Career Researchers (v0.1.0). Zenodo.
  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20221929

**The Evidence-Based Digital Marketer: Digital Campaign Strategy, Open
Marketing Analytics, and Responsible AI for the Modern Marketing
Professional** (Live, rolling release: Weeks 1-3 of 15 published)
- Author: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin
- Villa College course textbook, module DMS505
- Published: 28 June 2026 (first release)
- Web edition: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/digital-marketing-2026/
- Licence: CC BY 4.0

**Data-Driven Management: Statistics for Managers** (Under review, first
public release expected June 2026)
- Author: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin
- 27 chapters across 8 parts; book, lecture decks, companion site, worked
  examples, instructor resources, Moodle package
- Status page: https://flairmi.com/textbooks/ddmm.html

**AI-Powered Marketing Analytics: Applied Methods for Managers** (Proofreading)
- Author: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin
- 12 chapters across 5 parts; applied companion to Data-Driven Management
- Status page: https://flairmi.com/textbooks/marai.html

**Applied Survey Research and Data Analysis: From Constructs to Conclusions
Using R** (Proofreading)
- Author: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin
- 41 chapters across 14 parts; survey design, measurement, modelling, and
  reproducible reporting in R
- Status page: https://flairmi.com/textbooks/asrda.html

Full list with current status: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/textbooks.html

## Software

**surveyframe** (R package, live on CRAN)
- End-to-end survey research workflows: instrument design, static HTML
  export, Shiny module, response quality checking, psychometric
  diagnostics, reproducible HTML reporting.
- CRAN: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=surveyframe

**StatChooser** (free web app, live)
- Recommends a statistical test from four questions about research goal,
  design, data, and measurement level. Companion to surveyframe.
- App: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/statchooser/

## Templates and web tools

- Marketing Decision Toolkit (10 free Excel workbooks): https://github.com/MohammedAliSharafuddin/marketing-decision-toolkit
- Price Memory (grocery price tracker): https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/price-memory/
- Margin Guard (promotion break-even calculator): https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/margin-guard/
- Persona Builder (UX and marketing persona card builder, PNG/PDF export): https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/persona-builder/
- Full list: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/templates.html

## Research

23 publications, 20 conference presentations, 9 funded research projects,
2014-2026. Full list with DOIs: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/research.html

## Live surveys

Active research survey instruments built with surveyframe, open to
eligible participants: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/live-surveys/
